{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/willow_planks.png
|durability=20
|mass_damage=1
|hardness_damage=0.95
|swing_speed=4.8
|tags=wood
|modifiers=durable
}}


== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Planks]]
